Tennoji to Seoul Logistics

Wednesday – Thursday, May 27–28, 2026  •  Hotel Trusty Osaka Abeno → KIX → ICN → Hotel Cappuccino Seoul
Wednesday, May 27 — Osaka with Ikuo
Explore
Touring Osaka with Ikuo Hotel Trusty Osaka Abeno  •  No fixed schedule

Full day in Osaka with Ikuo. No hard logistics today — enjoy the city. One required task this evening before 10:00 PM.

  • 1
    Buy JR Haruka tickets — JR Tennoji Station
    2-min walk from Hotel Trusty. Use the JR ticket machines (credit card accepted) or the JR West staffed counter. Purchase 2 reserved seats for JR Haruka 3, 7:07 AM, May 28 — Tennoji → KIX Terminal 1. Buying tonight avoids any queue before a 6:30 AM room departure. Cost: ~¥2,600/person.
  • 2
    Arrange express checkout at Hotel Trusty front desk
    Stop at the front desk on the way back from buying Haruka tickets. Settle any outstanding charges, confirm the final bill, and ask for an express checkout envelope. Leave key cards in the drop box on your way out at 6:30 AM — no front desk stop in the morning. Departing the room at 6:30 puts you at the platform by ~6:35, giving a comfortable 32-minute buffer before the 7:07 AM departure.
iPhone
Evening — Korea eSIM Setup at Hotel Abeno Do this on hotel Wi-Fi tonight  •  takes ~5 minutes  •  ready to activate on landing
📱 Complete these four settings changes tonight at the hotel while on Wi-Fi. Doing this now avoids scrambling at KIX on a 6:45 AM checkout morning. Korea eSIM will be ready to activate the moment you land at ICN.
Setting Path Action
Install Korea eSIM Settings → Cellular → Add eSIM Scan QR code from Korea eSIM provider while on hotel Wi-Fi
Korea eSIM — Cellular Data Settings → Cellular → Cellular Data Select Korea eSIM line
Korea eSIM — Data Roaming Settings → Cellular → [Korea eSIM line] Turn Data Roaming ON
Japan eSIM — Data Roaming Settings → Cellular → [Japan eSIM line] Turn Data Roaming OFF
Thursday, May 28 — Departure Day
Checkout
6:30 AM — Leave Room, Hotel Trusty Carry all bags to KIX — no Takkyubin for this leg
🕑 Timing
Leave room: 6:30 AM Train departs: 7:07 AM Walk to station: ~2 min
📦 All Bags Travel With You
No Takkyubin forwarding for this leg. All bags go to KIX, are checked onto the Asiana flight, and arrive at Incheon — eliminating checked-bag pickup at ICN.
Train
7:07 AM — JR Haruka 3 Tennoji → KIX Terminal 1  •  Platform 15  •  Direct, no transfers

Airport

🕑 Sequence
Arrive T1: ~7:42 AM Check-in closes: 9:40 AM Gate closes: 10:20 AM
Check-in Counter4F E Island, Terminal 1 — look for Asiana Airlines signage
Counter HoursOpens 7:40 AM — closes 9:40 AM
Baggage DropSelf-service E Island — 6:50 AM–10:50 AM
Immigration & SecurityJapanese departure screening — allow 30–40 min
Gate Closes10:20 AM — 20 min before departure
¥ Spend remaining yen after clearing security. Duty-free shops, convenience stores, and restaurants on the 3F departure level at KIX T1. JPY will not be needed after this point.

Incheon Arrival — ICN Terminal 2
Arrival
12:40 PM — ICN Terminal 2 Arrival & Immigration K-ETA completed  •  Q-Code not required
✓ K-ETA — Completed March 12, 2026
Korea Electronic Travel Authorization (eta.go.kr). Valid 2 years / multiple entries. K-ETA holders bypass the e-Arrival card kiosks at ICN T2 — significant time savings at immigration. ~$8 USD / ~₩10,000 per person.
⛔ Q-Code — No longer required. Korea dropped all COVID-era entry requirements in 2024. Ignore any reference to Q-Code on the plane or in older travel guides.
  • 1
    Immigration — ICN T2
    Proceed to immigration. Use the K-ETA lane to skip the e-Arrival card kiosks. U.S. passport holders with K-ETA typically clear quickly.
  • 2
    Baggage Claim — Collect checked bags
    Bags were checked through at KIX. Collect at the ICN T2 baggage carousel before exiting to the Arrival Lobby.
  • 3
    Exit Customs → Follow Signs to B1 Transportation Center
    Proceed through customs and exit the Arrivals Hall. Follow signs to the B1 Transportation Center — take the escalator or elevator down one level. Bus 6703 boards at B1 (not at the 1F curbside).
Transit — ICN → Gangnam
Bus
Bus 6703 — K Airport Limousine ICN Terminal 2 → Eonju Station (Hotel Samjung) → Hotel Cappuccino
🕑 Key Departures from ICN T2 — Target the 14:00 bus
12:13 — gone before you land 13:15 — too tight (35 min after landing) ▶ 14:00 — target bus 15:00 — fallback
Interval: 50–65 min between buses  •  Last bus from T2: 22:35  •  Source: klimousine.com
🚌 Step-by-Step: Arrivals → B1 Transportation Center → Bus 6703
  • After clearing customs, follow signs for Transportation Center / B1 — take the escalator or elevator down one level from the Arrivals Hall to the underground Transit Center.
  • Buy ticket at B1 — two ticket offices flank the Bus Waiting Room (one on each side). Purchase Bus 6703 with debit card — tell them “Hotel Samjung” or “Eonju Station.” Kiosk machines also available at B1.
  • Board at Stop 18 or 19 in the Seoul Bus zone (center of B1 — see map below).
  • Ride to “Eonju Station (Hotel Samjung)” — announce if unsure, driver will confirm.
  • Walk to Hotel Cappuccino — exit at Hotel Samjung (150 Bongeunsa-ro). Hotel Cappuccino (155 Bongeunsa-ro) is the next building on the same side, ~70m away. (~1–2 min)
📱 Navigation Use Naver Maps or Kakao Maps for Seoul navigation — Google Maps is less reliable for transit in Korea.

ICN Terminal 2 — B1 Transportation Center  •  Seoul buses board at Stops 18 & 19 (center, marked in red)  •  Ticket offices on both sides of Bus Waiting Room  •  Source: klimousine.com

Bus6703 — K Airport Limousine (Gangnam/COEX)
BoardsICN Terminal 2, B1 Transportation Center — Stop 18 or 19 (Seoul Bus zone)
Ticket officeB1 Transportation Center — ticket offices flanking Bus Waiting Room, or kiosk machine
Interval50–65 minutes between buses
Target departure14:00 from T2  •  Fallback: 15:00 from T2
AlightsEonju Station (Hotel Samjung)
Walk to hotel~70m along Bongeunsa-ro — next building from Hotel Samjung (~1–2 min)
Fare₩18,000/person  •  ₩36,000 total (2p)  •  Debit card at ticket office or kiosk

Check-in
Hotel Cappuccino — Gangnam Check-in from 3:00 PM  •  6 nights
🕑 Expected Arrival
Land ICN: 12:40 PM Clear ICN + board bus: ~2:00 PM Arrive hotel: ~3:00–3:30 PM
🕐 Check-in: Thursday, May 28 from 3:00 PM  •  Check-out: Wednesday, June 3 at 12:20 PM
🏠 6 nights  ·  2 adults  ·  1 room

Hotel Cappuccino Seoul — 155 Bongeunsa-ro, Gangnam-gu

🚌 From Bus 6703 Stop to Hotel Entrance
  • Step off at Eonju Station (Hotel Samjung) — you are in front of Hotel Samjung, 150 Bongeunsa-ro
  • Hotel Cappuccino (155 Bongeunsa-ro) is the next building along the same side of Bongeunsa-ro — ~70m; look for the Hotel Cappuccino signage immediately adjacent
📱 Navigation Search “Hotel Cappuccino Seoul” in Naver Maps or Kakao Maps if needed.
Appointment
5:00 PM — Muse Clinic Gangnam Leave hotel at 4:40 PM  •  ~12–15 min walk
🕑 Timing
Leave hotel: 4:40 PM Walk: ~12–15 min Appointment: 5:00 PM

Daeyeon Building, 452 Gangnam-daero, Gangnam-gu — Shake Shack (1F) / Muse Clinic (2F–5F)

🚌 Walking from Hotel Cappuccino (~15–20 min)
  • Exit the hotel and walk to Gangnam-daero (the wide main boulevard), ~5–7 min
  • Turn onto Gangnam-daero and head toward Gangnam Station
  • Walk ~300–400m along Gangnam-daero — look for the Daeyeon Building on your right
  • Landmark: Shake Shack is on the ground floor (1F) of the Daeyeon Building — unmistakable
  • Enter the building: Muse Clinic is on floors 2F–5F — 452 Gangnam-daero, Gangnam-gu
🚉 Subway alternative (~10 min) Walk to Eonju Station Exit 1 (~3 min) → Line 9 toward Gangnam → alight Sinnonhyeon Station, Exit 6 and walk ~560m along Gangnam-daero, or ride one more stop to Gangnam Station, Exit 10/11 and walk ~260m north. Both lead to the Daeyeon Building (Shake Shack).
📱 Navigation Search “뮤즈클리닉 강남” (Muse Clinic Gangnam) in Naver Maps or Kakao Maps.
After
After Appointment — T-Money Cards & KRW Cash Muse Clinic area  •  Gangnam-daero
  • 1
    Purchase & load both T-Money cards — CU or GS25
    Convenience stores (CU or GS25) are steps away from Muse Clinic. Buy T-Money cards and load initial balance at the counter.
  • 2
    Withdraw KRW cash
    Woori Bank (Global ATM) is almost directly across from Muse Clinic — accepts U.S. debit cards.
    Alternatively: 7-Eleven (Seven Bank ATM) nearby also accepts U.S. debit cards.
